name: codex-pushover-notify
description: Send Pushover notifications when Codex finishes a turn or needs user attention.

interface.shortDescription: Notify your phone when Codex finishes or needs you.
interface.longDescription: Codex Pushover Notify adds lifecycle hooks that record turn start time and send a Pushover notification when Codex stops. It also exposes MCP tools so Codex can proactively notify you or request a decision for real blockers.
defaultPrompt: Ask me for a decision with Pushover.
